reply: It's important to remember that God's love and forgiveness are always available to us. According to Christian teachings, when we seek forgiveness sincerely, God is willing to forgive our sins. If you’re feeling troubled about your marriage, it may be helpful to take a moment to pray and ask God for guidance and peace. Remember, God's grace is abundant and His love is unconditional. If you’re comfortable, talking to your pastor or another trusted spiritual advisor may also provide support and reassurance during this time.
